bird.name: Uluguru bushshrike
bird.summary: The Uluguru bushshrike (Malaconotus alius) is a species of rare bird occurring only in the Uluguru Mountains in Morogoro Region of Tanzania…

locations.name: 莫罗戈罗区
locations.summary: 莫罗戈罗区是坦桑尼亞的一個地區，下分七縣。總面積70,799平方公里，2002年人口1,759,809。首府莫羅戈羅。 注释

relations.subject: Uluguru bushshrike
relations.evidence: However, in March 2007, a team of Wildlife Conservation Society of Tanzania discovered its presence in the Uluguru South Forest Reserve in Morogoro Region. There are an estimated 1200 pairs remaining and the population trend is stable
